summary: Impact Caritatif V1 feature tested. Backend: 21/26 tests passed (5 skipped - no charity data). Frontend: All UI elements verified. One wording issue found in transparency block.

wording_issues.issue: Line 126 contains 'reversés' in phrase 'Ils ne sont pas encore reversés' - violates requirement to never use 'reversé' or 'donné'
wording_issues.current_text: Ils ne sont pas encore reversés.
wording_issues.suggested_fix: Change to 'Ces montants ne sont pas encore transférés aux associations.' or similar wording avoiding 'reversé'

backend: test_charity_returns_contributions_object - contributions.items, total, skip, limit, has_more
frontend: Empty state displays with transparency block
Transparency block contains 'fléchés pour des associations'
Dashboard ImpactCard shows 'fléchés pour des associations' (not 'générés')
Dashboard Analytics KPI charity shows 'Fléchés pour des associations' (not 'Impact caritatif')

GET /api/impact/charity.payout_message: Les montants fléchés sont accumulés sur la plateforme. Le reversement automatique vers les associations sera implémenté dans une prochaine version.

action_items: FIX WORDING: In /app/frontend/src/pages/ImpactPage.js line 126, change 'Ils ne sont pas encore reversés.' to avoid using 'reversé' - suggest 'Ces montants ne sont pas encore transférés aux associations.' or 'Le transfert vers les associations n'a pas encore eu lieu.'
critical_code_review_comments: TransparencyBlock uses 'reversés' which violates the requirement to never use 'reversé' or 'donné' in wording
seed_data_creation: None - no charity data exists in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Impact Caritatif V1 feature implemented. Backend endpoints /api/impact and /api/impact/charity work correctly. Frontend /impact page shows empty state correctly. Dashboard ImpactCard and Analytics KPI use correct wording. One wording issue: TransparencyBlock line 126 uses 'reversés' which should be changed. No charity contribution data exists in database - to fully test contributions list and associations, test data with charity beneficiaries needs to be created.
